reviews.review_description: You must see!

reviews.review_title: Paper Birds on Quest 3 not launching
reviews.review_description: Had paper birds on quest 2 and worked fine. Bought a quest 3 today, played/tested a lot of apps and they worked fine. When I tried Paper Birds, it says on the quest 3 loading screen forever
Great experience, wonderful art. Inspired to go make something

reviews.review_title: Wouldn't let kids under 10 watch really
reviews.review_description: Interesting experience but i found it annoying  not always knowing where to look and having the scenes totally in my face.  The interaction was cool but i felt the theme with the darkness could give some kids nightmares - so play it alone before giving it to your young kids .

Mh so and so..some parts are really cute as the interactive playing with sounds, even the graphic, but I found the overall story a bit too much dark with not that great connection between facts. I would not rebuy at such a price (around 6€), maybe at a lower price yes
This was so beautiful. So immersive and powerful. We’ll done!
A little bit dark in my opinion
Not sure what is so creative or inspirational about it that other people are talking about. Watch drawn out cartoon for 20 minutes, get to waive your hands couple times to create Milky Way. The end .

developer_response.body: The story is 30 minutes and has 5 different interactive sections. This is not accurate.

reviews.review_title: I get it, but I don’t get it.
reviews.review_description:
What little I got to see was absolutely breathtaking. The visuals, the emotional swell of the music, the interactivity (short but precious). There is SO much promise with this. There really, truly is.

But.

This was advertised as a story. A story implies a beginning/middle/end. This tale was just barely getting off the tarmac before ending without really fleshing out the plot. If I didn’t read the description, I wouldn’t have caught on to the plot because we kinda went from birds to music/throwing stars to sister to grandpa’s weird secrets. The plot just didn’t gel, and then suddenly floated off into the ether. When I read the reviews about it being so short, I thought with similar content like Gloomy Eyes being 3 chapters I would at least be able to get into the meat and potatoes of the story. This felt more like a demo. And then it got me thinking about what the point of my interactions with the story are beyond throwing stars (still BEAUTIFUL) and overall it just left me with a “confused puppy head-tilt” feeling. 

I want to give this a 5 just for the creativity and beauty alone but I really can’t in good conscience since there’s just not enough...even for $5.

Suggestion...in the future wait until the story is complete to release it. If you choose not to, then include more of an Act 1 so we don’t feel cheated, or mention what we’re actually going to get in the description. I don’t know if it was released this way because you were excited to push it out to the public or if your intention was to make the audience hunger for more. If it’s the latter, be careful because you may make the audience hesitate to buy your titles again. 
To end on a good note, you’ve got something really special here. Keep building!!

developer_response.body: Hey!!! So PART 2 IS OUT AND FREE for whoever got part 1.... better later than never. Sorry about the wait. Hope you like it better now. Thanks!!!

reviews.review_description:
The character animation is jerky. The interaction is incredibly limited. The story is literally a few minutes long. Dark and gloomy doesn't work well on the Quest 2 as it makes the blacks more like dirty grey. 

There are much better stories out there, try The Line for example.

developer_response.body: This is outdated. Please update and check part I & II. Thanks

reviews.review_title: I need part 2 in my life ASAP!
reviews.review_description: This was freakin incredible loved zooming in and peeking in spaces in the real world! I’m speechless really can’t wait for more! Hopefully soon! Great captivating story really grabs you right from the start!

developer_response.body:
Haha thank you so much!!! We're working as fast as possible to get it ready. Part II will have many new things!

UPDATE: PART 2 IS OUT AND FREE for anybody who owns part 1

Just update and you're all set. I really recommend watching the whole thing from the start. Many adjustments on part 1 and it's set as a single 30 mins piece now.
Another note, the Quest 2 version has much better graphics but this still works in Quest 1. Hope you like it!

reviews.review_description:
Very beautifully animated and produced short story. Great for someone's first time in VR. Can be done sitting but if you have some room to move it might be a bit more fun. 

Can't wait for more from this story!

developer_response.body: thank you!!! we're working on it :)

reviews.review_description: It made me fall in love with VR. Such beautiful music and art direction that my jaw was dropped the entire time. I was almost at tears in the end. I’m so impressed with the animation team/developers

developer_response.body: thank you so much <3 happy you like it so much

reviews.review_description: Such a beautiful immersive story. Wonderful to look at.

I’m so impressed with the work done for this project! The story is beautiful and nostalgic. I love miniatures and I play the piano so I completely immersed myself into looking at all the details in each scene. Being able to look at them 360• was great! The contrast, the colours, the settings, the different levels and definitely the music makes it a beautiful experience. Being able to change the visuals and the environment interacting with the story at times was also really nice. I can’t wait for part 2!

developer_response.body:
THANK YOU for your beautiful words and lovely feedback! Really enegizing to start the week working on Part II :)

UPDATE: PART 2 IS OUT AND FREE for anybody who owns part 1

Just update and you're all set. I really recommend watching the whole thing from the start. Many adjustments on part 1 and it's set as a single 30 mins piece now.
Another note, the Quest 2 version has much better graphics but this still works in Quest 1. Hope you like it!

reviews.review_description: The nicest graphic I have seen so far on Quest 2

There’re moments in life I never forget. Experiencing this story is one of them. For 20 minutes I dived into a dream. It’s on the edge of art, gaming and high-end storytelling. I passed it to my parents and it was so emotional for me seeing them, like a child, discovering a new era of sensational storytelling. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
How wonderful to read this review. Thank you so much, Rafael.

reviews.review_description: Awesome!! The best demo that sells the Quest 2 to anybody that watches this App.... I love it

reviews.review_description: This is an experience unlike any other. You are taken on journey to a beautiful magical place and immersed into the story.  If you appreciate filmmaking and storytelling I strongly encourage you to experience this. It’s well worth the price of entry. I’m excited to see what’s next from this talented team of artists.
